prompt: A dramatic vertical dark-fantasy anime key visual poster for the RPG 夢喰-BAKU-. Center the composition around 3 human figures layered in depth. In the background, a large intimidating adult man is shown from the chest up, facing forward, with messy wavy dark hair, light stubble, a partially open dark shirt, and a shadowed, ominous presence; his face is mostly obscured by darkness and framing, making him feel mysterious and threatening. In the foreground left, place 1 young man in a dynamic three-quarter pose lunging toward the viewer with his right hand stretched out dramatically, wearing a blue jacket over a white hoodie, with short tousled brown hair and a determined expression. In the foreground right, place 1 young woman standing slightly behind him, with long brown hair, a pale blouse, and a dark skirt or high-waisted bottom with a belt; she clasps her hands near her mouth or chest and looks anxious and vulnerable. Use a moody supernatural atmosphere with swirling black and deep violet smoke, ink-like shadows, spectral textures, and pixel-glitch fragments around the edges. Add broken chains diagonally in the background, several floating rectangular frames or screens, and a faint interior corridor or room behind the characters. Integrate the large Japanese title 夢喰 vertically in the center, rendered in bold white calligraphic kanji with purple splatter, scratches, and glow accents, partially overlapping the characters. At the bottom, include the Japanese tagline 分かるだろ？俺達が必要とされる理由がよ in elegant white text with part of the sentence highlighted in purple. In the top right corner, add a white studio logo reading DCC Project with a lotus-like emblem and large serif letters. Overall style: polished illustrated key art for a psychological horror RPG, ultra-detailed anime painting, high contrast, cinematic lighting, deep blacks, indigo and violet palette, ominous supernatural energy, poster-ready typography, premium promotional visual.
